# sunset v1.0.1

Sunset v1.0.1 is the first distribution baseline release published under the
canonical module path `github.com/enolalabs/sunset`.

## Highlights

- **Canonical module path.**  The Go module is now
  `github.com/enolalabs/sunset`.  Install and import paths use this
  organization exclusively.
- **No compatibility shim.**  v1.0.1 is published only at
  `github.com/enolalabs/sunset`.  No shim module is provided for the legacy
  `github.com/enolalab/sunset` path; consumers must update their imports to
  the canonical organization.  This keeps the release graph single-pathed and
  avoids a permanent alias that would complicate provenance.
- **Build-info-aware version resolver.**  The `sunset version` command and the
  generated `index.md` `sunset_version` field now report the version injected
  by release ldflags, falling back to embedded build info, then `dev`.

## Install / import

```bash
# binary (Linux amd64 example)
curl -fsSL -o sunset_1.0.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz \
  https://github.com/enolalabs/sunset/releases/download/v1.0.1/sunset_1.0.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz
```

```bash
# from source
go install github.com/enolalabs/sunset/cmd/sunset@v1.0.1
```

```go
// library
import "github.com/enolalabs/sunset/pkg/sunset"
```

Canonical, checksum-verified install snippets for every target live under
[`docs/snippets/v1.0.1/`](docs/snippets/v1.0.1) and are reproduced in the
[README](README.md#install).

## Release targets

Archives are named `sunset_<version>_<os>_<arch>.<format>`.

| OS | Arch | Archive | Format | Verified on |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Linux | amd64 | `sunset_1.0.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz` | tar.gz | `ubuntu-24.04` |
| Linux | arm64 | `sunset_1.0.1_linux_arm64.tar.gz` | tar.gz | `ubuntu-24.04-arm` |
| macOS | amd64 | `sunset_1.0.1_darwin_amd64.tar.gz` | tar.gz | `macos-15-intel` |
| macOS | arm64 | `sunset_1.0.1_darwin_arm64.tar.gz` | tar.gz | `macos-15` |
| Windows | amd64 | `sunset_1.0.1_windows_amd64.zip` | zip | `windows-2025` |

> Targets are built and verified on the named GitHub Actions runner
> environments only.  No minimum OS version or libc compatibility is claimed
> for any target.

## Checksums

Every archive digest is listed in
[`checksums.txt`](https://github.com/enolalabs/sunset/releases/download/v1.0.1/checksums.txt):

```
https://github.com/enolalabs/sunset/releases/download/v1.0.1/checksums.txt
```

SHA-256 verification detects corruption and byte mismatches.  It does **not**
authenticate the publisher: there are no release signatures or build
attestations in v1.0.1.  Signing and provenance attestations remain future
work.

## Verifying an install

Each install snippet under `docs/snippets/v1.0.1/` downloads only its target
archive plus `checksums.txt`, selects the matching entry, verifies it,
extracts, and runs `sunset version`:

- **Linux** — selects the exact filename entry and pipes it to
  `sha256sum --check`.
- **macOS** — selects the exact filename entry and pipes it to
  `shasum -a 256 -c`.
- **Windows** — selects the exact filename digest and compares it with
  `Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256`.
